hooks.command:
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; timeout 5 git fetch --quiet 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); upstream=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{u} 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$behind" = "0" ] && exit 0; recent=$(git log --pretty=format:"  - %h %s (%an, %cr)" HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null | head -5); jq -n --arg b "$branch" --arg u "$upstream" --arg n "$behind" --arg r "$recent" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("This local checkout is " + $n + " commit(s) BEHIND " + $u + " on branch " + $b + ":
" + $r + "

Tell the user there are new commits on the remote and ask whether they want to run `git pull` to sync. Do NOT run git pull automatically — wait for explicit user approval.")}}'
